title: Section 8
content: 1* * * The business of the said Association shall be managed by six Directors, and 2* * * Francis Macnaghten, Joseph Walker, Jasper Ouseley, Richard Howe Cockerell, Alexander Colvin, Joseph Willis, and James Church, Esquires, shall be the first Directors of the said Association
footnote: 1. The words “And it is hereby enacted, that” omitted by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and Sch. I. 2. The word “that” omitted by s. 2 and Sch. I, ibid.
